overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through a barren geothermal wilderness. The character traverses rocky terrain and tall grass approaching a steaming hot spring under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: barren geothermal basin with dry creek bed

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through rocky barren terrain following a winding dry creek bed

entered.detail: winding dry stream bed cutting through the barren landscape
multiple steam vents visible on the horizon indicating geothermal activity
tall dead pine trees scattered across the barren landscape
barren rocky ground with sparse patches of dry grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a desolate geothermal basin under an overcast sky, following the path of a dry creek bed. The landscape is rocky and barren with scattered dead trees and distant steam vents visible on the horizon.

events.description: ground vegetation transitions from sparse rocky terrain to tall yellow grass prairie

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through increasingly tall grass with steam vents visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall yellow prairie grass replacing the rocky barren ground
snow-covered mountain peak visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts from rocky barren ground to a tall grass prairie as the character continues walking. A snow-capped mountain becomes visible on the right horizon while geothermal steam vents remain visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring with active steam vent

events.description: geothermal pool comes into view ahead surrounded by tall grass

agents.ego_description: approaching a steaming hot spring with an active steam vent on the right

entered.detail: circular hot spring with turquoise water surrounded by tall grass
prominent geothermal steam vent emitting white smoke on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a geothermal hot spring with turquoise water surrounded by dense tall grass. An active steam vent emits white smoke on the right side while the snow-capped mountain remains visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate geothermal basin that gradually transitions into a lush, steaming prairie. It begins with the character traversing a rocky, barren landscape along a dry creek bed, where scattered dead trees and distant steam vents punctuate the horizon under an overcast sky. As the character continues forward, the rocky ground gives way to a wide prairie of tall grass, revealing a snow-capped mountain emerging on the right horizon. The scene then shifts toward a geothermal hot spring with vibrant turquoise water, moving through the dense grass as an active steam vent emits white smoke nearby. Finally, the camera settles on the steaming waters while the distant mountain remains a constant fixture against the gray sky.
